questions.clue: A word that describes a noun, such as "happy," "blue," or "enormous."
This language feature uses exaggeration for effect, such as "I've told you a million times."
"The wind whispered through the trees" is an example of this language feature, where human qualities are given to a non-human thing.
The author's attitude toward a subject or audience is known as this.
A recurring object, symbol, image, or idea that helps develop a theme is known as this.
A triangle with sides of lengths 3, 4, and 5 is this type of triangle.
Using Pythagoras' Theorem, find the hypotenuse of a right-angled triangle with sides 6 and 8.
The probability of rolling a 6 on a fair six-sided die is this fraction.
When two quantities increase at the same rate, they are said to be in this type of relationship.
The graph of y=x² is known by this mathematical name.
Humans have this many pairs of chromosomes in most body cells.
The pH of a neutral solution is this number.
This unit is used to measure force.
The gas that makes up approximately 78% of Earth's atmosphere.
An atom with a different number of neutrons than usual, but the same number of protons, is known as this.
The French word for "thank you."
The French word chien refers to this animal.
The French phrase s'il vous plaît is commonly used to mean this.
The French word bibliothèque refers to this place.
This is the French word for "window."
New Zealand's head of state is this monarch (Full title like King Henry VIII).
The legislative branch of New Zealand's government meets in this city.
This term describes the movement of people from rural areas into cities.
The study of how people, resources, and businesses interact is called this.
This economic term refers to a sustained increase in the general price of goods and services over time.
Colours opposite each other on the colour wheel are known as these.
This family of musical instruments includes the violin, cello, and double bass.
A dance performed by a group moving together in a coordinated pattern is known by this term.
This dramatic technique involves speaking directly to the audience while other characters on stage cannot hear.
The symbol ♯ raises a note by this amount.
A story told by a narrator who uses "I" and participates in the events is written in this point of view.
A reference to another text, historical event, or famous figure is known as this literary device.
When the audience knows something that a character does not, this technique is being used.
The repetition of consonant sounds at the beginning of nearby words is known as this.
A character who contrasts with another character in order to highlight their qualities is known as this.
The middle value in an ordered set of data is known as this.
A graph commonly used to display the distribution of numerical data by grouping values into intervals.
If two variables tend to increase together, they are said to have this type of relationship.
A value that lies unusually far from the rest of the data is known as this.
The number of standard deviations a value is from the mean is called this.
The SI unit of force is named after this scientist.
This quantity is calculated by multiplying mass by velocity.
The speed of a wave can be found by multiplying its frequency by this quantity.
When light passes from one medium into another and changes direction, this phenomenon occurs.
The tendency of an object to resist changes in its motion is known as this.
The amount of substance containing approximately 6.02×10^23 particles is called this.
Atoms of the same element with different numbers of neutrons are known as these.
The sharing of electrons between atoms forms this type of bond.
This organic functional group contains an oxygen atom bonded to a hydrogen atom (-OH).
A reaction in which electrons are transferred between substances is known by this term.
The molecule that carries genetic information in living organisms.
This process produces two genetically identical daughter cells.
The units of heredity passed from parents to offspring are known as these.
The process by which organisms with advantageous traits are more likely to survive and reproduce is known as this.
The sequence of three bases on mRNA that codes for an amino acid is known as this.
Copying someone else's work and presenting it as your own is known as this.
A statement that can be tested through investigation is known as this.
This logical error occurs when someone argues that because two events happened together, one must have caused the other.
This psychological effect describes the tendency for people with low ability in a subject to overestimate their competence.
This principle suggests that, when multiple explanations are possible, the simplest one is usually preferred.

finalJeopardy.clue: This word, used in mathematics, science, and everyday life, comes from the Latin for 'unknown quantity' and is commonly represented by the letter x.
